name: Molasses Doughnuts ABM
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Powdered Sugar or 1/2 cup Granulated Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Place the first 11 ingredients in the machine and program for knead, first rise, and press start. The dough will be slightly sticky; a small amount will stick to your finger but holds shape during kneading.
3. Flour your work surface and rolling pin.
4. When the cycle is complete, turn the dough out onto the floured surface and let it sit for 10 minutes.
5. Roll the dough to 1/3 inch thick. Use enough flour to prevent sticking.
6. Cut doughnuts with a cutter. Place them on a greased baking sheet and cover with a clean towel.
7. Let rise for 1 hour, or until doubled in bulk.
8. Heat 1 1/2 to 2 inches of oil in a saucepan or deep fryer using a thermometer to maintain temperature.
9. Fry 2 to 3 doughnuts at a time, turning frequently and spooning hot oil over them.
10. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Check the first few for doneness. Shake warm doughnuts (3 or 4 at a time) in a sturdy paper bag with sugar.
